input.background: The asthma survey considered in previous illustrative examples addresses a binomial random variable with n=20 and p=0.04. It follows that q=1-0.04=0.96.
input.question: Calculate the variance and standard deviation of the binomial random variable.

output.answer: It has variance σ²=n p q= 20 ⋅ 0.04 ⋅ 0.96=0.768 and standard deviation σ=√(n p q)= √(20 ⋅ 0.04 ⋅ 0.96)=0.8764.

n.description: Number of trials in the binomial distribution.

p.description: Probability of success in each trial of the binomial distribution.

q.description: Probability of failure in each trial of the binomial distribution, calculated as 1-p.

meta_info.caption: Expected value and variance of a binomial random vari-able (Asthma survey).
